TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Russia hya ga cyux maki tay 60 00 N, 100 00 E na Aziya syuw. kwara kinghciyan niya 17,098,242 sq km (maki tay 1ginkgan kin wahci) (kinwhci niya ga 16,377,742 sq km, kinwhci na lawsayan wsilung hya ga 720,500 sq km) kinkhmayan kwara squliq hya ga 142,355,415. pinbcyan naha sni naha rhzyal hya iy pqmahun hya ga 13.10%, lhlahuy hya ga 49.40%, sni naha sa pptzyuwaw sa bzinah hya ga 37.50%. spzyang qalang na Kokka spzyang naha krahu qalang hya ga Moscow. snyan kinramat inlungan na Kokka snyan kinramat inlungan na Kokka hya ga 12 na tay mtzyu byacing na qutux kawas. mzhuw Kokka mrhuw Kokka ta misuw hya ga Vladimir Putin, aring ryax 7 squ byacing tay 5 sa kawas 2012 lga, musa spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. cinkhulan sa knita sa brbiru CIA 外交部
S.PHON: rus~ɕs~ɕia ħja ɣa ʦ~ʨjux maki taj ** ** n, *** ** e na azija s~ɕjuw. kwara kiŋħʦ~ʨijan nija **,***,*** s~ɕq km (maki taj *ɣinkɣan kin waħʦ~ʨi) (kinwħʦ~ʨi nija ɣa **,***,*** s~ɕq km, kinwħʦ~ʨi na laws~ɕajan ws~ɕiluŋ ħja ɣa ***,*** s~ɕq km) kinkħmajan kwara s~ɕquliq ħja ɣa ***,***,***. pinβʦ~ʨjan naħa s~ɕni naħa rħzjal ħja ij pqmaħun ħja ɣa **.**%, lħlaħuj ħja ɣa **.**%, s~ɕni naħa s~ɕa pptzjuwaw s~ɕa βzinaħ ħja ɣa **.**%. s~ɕpzjaŋ qalaŋ na kokka s~ɕpzjaŋ naħa kraħu qalaŋ ħja ɣa mos~ɕʦ~ʨow. s~ɕnjan kinramat inluŋan na kokka s~ɕnjan kinramat inluŋan na kokka ħja ɣa ** na taj mtzju βjaʦ~ʨiŋ na qutux kawas~ɕ. mzħuw kokka mrħuw kokka ta mis~ɕuw ħja ɣa *la*imir putin, ariŋ rjax * s~ɕqu βjaʦ~ʨiŋ taj * s~ɕa kawas~ɕ **** lɣa, mus~ɕa s~ɕpazjaŋ βalaj ms~ɕʔrux kja la. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knita s~ɕa βrβiru ʦ~ʨia ***
S.FORM: Russia hya ga cyux maki tay 60 00 N, 100 00 E na Aziya syuw. kwara kinghciyan niya 17,098,242 sq km (maki tay 1ginkgan kin wahci) (kinwhci niya ga 16,377,742 sq km, kinwhci na lawsayan wsilung hya ga 720,500 sq km) kinkhmayan kwara squliq hya ga 142,355,415. pinbcyan naha sni naha rhzyal hya iy pqmahun hya ga 13.10%, lhlahuy hya ga 49.40%, sni naha sa pptzyuwaw sa bzinah hya ga 37.50%. spzyang qalang na Kokka spzyang naha krahu qalang hya ga Moscow. snyan kinramat inlungan na Kokka snyan kinramat inlungan na Kokka hya ga 12 na tay mtzyu byacing na qutux kawas. mzhuw Kokka mrhuw Kokka ta misuw hya ga Vladimir Putin, aring ryax 7 squ byacing tay 5 sa kawas 2012 lga, musa spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. cinkhulan sa knita sa brbiru CIA 外交部
S.PHON: rus~ɕs~ɕia ħja ɣa ʦ~ʨjux maki taj ** ** n, *** ** e na azija s~ɕjuw. kwara kiŋħʦ~ʨijan nija **,***,*** s~ɕq km (maki taj *ɣinkɣan kin waħʦ~ʨi) (kinwħʦ~ʨi nija ɣa **,***,*** s~ɕq km, kinwħʦ~ʨi na laws~ɕajan ws~ɕiluŋ ħja ɣa ***,*** s~ɕq km) kinkħmajan kwara s~ɕquliq ħja ɣa ***,***,***. pinβʦ~ʨjan naħa s~ɕni naħa rħzjal ħja ij pqmaħun ħja ɣa **.**%, lħlaħuj ħja ɣa **.**%, s~ɕni naħa s~ɕa pptzjuwaw s~ɕa βzinaħ ħja ɣa **.**%. s~ɕpzjaŋ qalaŋ na kokka s~ɕpzjaŋ naħa kraħu qalaŋ ħja ɣa mos~ɕʦ~ʨow. s~ɕnjan kinramat inluŋan na kokka s~ɕnjan kinramat inluŋan na kokka ħja ɣa ** na taj mtzju βjaʦ~ʨiŋ na qutux kawas~ɕ. mzħuw kokka mrħuw kokka ta mis~ɕuw ħja ɣa *la*imir putin, ariŋ rjax * s~ɕqu βjaʦ~ʨiŋ taj * s~ɕa kawas~ɕ **** lɣa, mus~ɕa s~ɕpazjaŋ βalaj ms~ɕʔrux kja la. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knita s~ɕa βrβiru ʦ~ʨia ***
